title: guersentia angustifolia
intro: Guersentia angustifolia, also known as Narrow-leaved Guarea, is a tropical plant native to Central and South America, belonging to the family Meliaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its bark, which contains guaiane sesquiterpenes, and has been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Guersentia angustifolia include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues. Guersentia angustifolia is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and can be used externally as a poultice or ointment for topical applications.
